events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes DP impulse lines sloped wrong for service - gas taps below pipe / liquid taps on top. This is a classic instrumentation installation error. For gas service, taps should be on top of the pipe and impulse lines sloped upward to the transmitter. For liquid service, taps should be on bottom and lines sloped downward. The scenario says it's reversed - "gas taps below pipe / liquid taps on top" which is wrong.

This is non-compliant with API RP 551 which specifies proper tap locations and impulse line sloping for different services.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (could cause measurement errors, process issues)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective
Percent complete: maybe 70-80% since roughed in but not closed out
